messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0148",
  "title": "POINT AWARDS",
  "page_index": 45,
  "page_range": "45"
}

Section text:
## POINT AWARDS

message.content: This section consists solely of the heading "POINT AWARDS" on page 45 and contains no substantive content. It can only answer basic structural or navigational questions regarding the existence and location of a "POINT AWARDS" section. It does not provide information to answer questions about specific topics, entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types.
